data.description:
## Description

**What**: Update existing project documentation to reflect the new PRECONDITIONS degradation channel, ack mechanism, and pre-commit hook introduced by this epic.

**Why**: Without documentation updates, future agents will operate with outdated guidance about PRECONDITIONS events, EMIT-PRECONDITIONS landmarks, and the sprint closure flow.

**Scope**:
- IN: Update CLAUDE.md to describe the degradation:bool + degradation_type fields, EMIT-PRECONDITIONS landmark, and preconditions-ack CLI; update plugins/dso/docs/CONFIGURATION-REFERENCE.md if any new config keys were introduced; update KNOWN-ISSUES.md with any known behavioral constraints (cross-worktree race window, non-Latin fallback); verify CLAUDE.md accurately describes the sprint Step 10a unacked-degradation check; follow .claude/docs/DOCUMENTATION-GUIDE.md
- OUT: Creating new documentation files (precondition-degradation-consumers.md and precondition-marker-consumers.md are in-scope for S1/S2 to create; this story only updates already-existing docs)

## Done Definitions

- When this story is complete, CLAUDE.md accurately describes the degradation channel additions and the preconditions-ack CLI
  ← Satisfies: documentation accuracy for the new ack mechanism
- When this story is complete, any new config keys introduced by this epic are documented in CONFIGURATION-REFERENCE.md

## Considerations

- Follow .claude/docs/DOCUMENTATION-GUIDE.md for documentation formatting, structure, and conventions

## Escalation Policy

**Escalation policy**: Proceed unless a significant assumption is required to continue — one that could send the implementation in the wrong direction. Escalate only when genuinely blocked without a reasonable inference. Document all assumptions made without escalating.
data.title: Update project docs to reflect PRECONDITIONS degradation channel, ack mechanism, and pre-commit hook
